episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 421: Outlaws at Thunder Junction Reveals
episode.description: James and Cliff get you caught up on all the latest in MTGFinance news, fast movers, cards to watch and dive into the onslaught of Outlaws at Thunder Junction card previews.
